name: Ch 17 — ── Quality fields (required for audit) ──
what_it_solves: CRISPRO_SL_PHD_ROADMAP chapter '── Quality fields (required for audit) ──' spanning lines 1902..2000.
how_it_solves: Chapter body preview (first 2000 chars) attached; full content lives in the source file. Subheadings enumerated.
why_it_exists: Chapter is the natural unit of the roadmap — one entity per chapter makes 'what does Ch 3.4 say about the fuser?' addressable.

attributes.body_preview_2000c:
powered=True,                          # False if n_mut < 15
	    n_mut=0,                               # Number of mutant lines (DepMap)
	    n_wt=0,                                # Number of wildtype lines (DepMap)
	    cohens_d=0.0,                          # Effect size (DepMap)
	    fdr=1.0,                               # FDR-corrected p-value (DepMap)
	),
	

Acceptable Modality Values
Value
	Meaning
	When to Use
	POSITIVE
	Evidence meets the threshold for this modality
	IC50 ratio ≥ 3, Cohen's d ≥ 0.5, clinical response confirmed
	NEGATIVE
	Tested but did not meet threshold
	Experiment performed but no effect observed
	MISSING
	No data available for this modality
	Modality has not been tested for this gene-axis pair
	NOT_APPLICABLE
	Modality does not apply
	e.g., PRISM for a gene that has no drug inhibitor available
	________________
